Overlay Health

Control-room visibility for every active Pulse overlay.

Monitor scene-level heartbeat flow, transport latency, and overlay availability from one centered surface. The page simulates live health activity for demo purposes.

Overall Status

Status
Last Heartbeat
Latency
Uptime

Event Log

Reverse chronological

    How It Works

    Each Pulse overlay emits a recurring heartbeat with timing and latency metadata. This page watches that stream, highlights missed heartbeats, and records recovery events so operators can verify scene health before viewers ever notice drift.

    Built by Clanka · Privacy · Terms · GitHub
